items.title: Sophie Cunningham erupts from deep as Fever rout Tempo for fourth straight win
items.body_excerpt: The Indiana Fever scored a franchise record 113 points in regulation and outscored the Toronto Tempo by 19 points in the second half en route to a 113-91 win — their sixth in a row at Gainbridge Fieldhouse. It was an offensive showcase on Tuesday evening, at least after a…

items.title: Sacramento Kings 2026 Offseason Part 1: Salvaging a Tough Situation | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: James Ham joins the show to discuss the Kings upcoming offseason. We reflect on the last few years, touch on their outlook, and discuss what needs to be done to hopefully turn the ship around. You can follow Yossi on: Twitter: https://twitter.com/YossiGozlan BlueSky:…

items.title: The pressure of a 'can't miss' draft board
items.body_excerpt: If the four top prospects are all expected to be good to great NBA players, how do front office slice the information to make the right pick? Shadows of 2022 spread. Good morning.
